description_long: This is a low-polygon adult male figure dressed in formal attire, featuring a fitted jacket, collared shirt, and tie, paired with straight-cut trousers. The figure stands upright with arms relaxed at the sides and feet flat on the ground, giving a composed and professional appearance. The facial features are stylized and angular, with a defined jawline and short, neatly styled hair. The shoes are formal and match the overall business-like ensemble. The clothing appears tailored, with the jacket and trousers fitting closely to the body. The overall form is blocky and geometric, typical of stylized digital representations for urban environments.
description: A stylized adult male in formal business attire, standing upright with a composed posture and short, neat hair.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the figure, highlighting the straight posture and the fitted jacket and trousers.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the facial features, collared shirt, tie, and symmetrical stance with arms at the sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the clean lines of the suit and the formal shoes.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the jacket, straight trousers, and the back of the head with short hair.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tie
